column1:
Determine whether a given statement qualifies as a proposition.  
Translate English propositions into formal logical notation using propositional variables.  
Construct and interpret truth tables for logical operations including conjunction, disjunction (inclusive and exclusive), and negation.  
Evaluate the truth values of compound propositions based on the truth values of their components.  
Distinguish between inclusive or and exclusive or in logical expressions and natural language contexts.
